subject: History
chapter: Tribals, Dikus and the Vision of a Golden Age

activities_projects.title: Who Are Tribals?
activities_projects.objective: Understand the basic idea of tribal communities
steps: Write the meaning of the word 'tribal'
List two examples of tribal communities mentioned in the chapter
Write one feature of tribal life
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the concept of tribal communities

activities_projects.title: Meaning Match Activity
activities_projects.objective: Learn important terms from the chapter
steps: Write terms like Tribal, Diku, and Golden Age
Write their meanings from the chapter
Match the terms with correct definitions

activities_projects.title: Birsa Munda Introduction
activities_projects.objective: Know about the tribal leader Birsa Munda
steps: Read about Birsa Munda in the chapter
Write when he lived
Write two important things he did for his people
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about an important tribal leader

activities_projects.title: Tribal Life Observation
activities_projects.objective: Understand the lifestyle of tribal communities
steps: Read about how tribals lived and worked
Write three activities they usually did
Explain one activity in two lines
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand daily life of tribal groups

activities_projects.title: Cause and Effect – Tribal Revolt
steps: Read about problems faced by tribals
Write two causes of tribal revolts
Write one effect of the revolt
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn basic causes of tribal resistance

activities_projects.title: Picture Description
steps: Look at a picture related to tribal life in the chapter
Write what you observe in the picture
Write what you think is happening
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to observe and interpret historical images

activities_projects.title: Simple Timeline
activities_projects.objective: Understand events related to Birsa Munda
steps: Read the events related to Birsa Munda
Write them in order of time
Create a small timeline
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the sequence of historical events

activities_projects.title: Tribal Occupations List
activities_projects.objective: Identify work done by tribal communities
steps: Read about tribal occupations
List at least four types of work done by tribals
Write one line explaining each

activities_projects.title: Short Paragraph Writing
steps: Write a short paragraph about Birsa Munda
Mention who he was
Explain why he is remembered today

activities_projects.title: Young Historian Poster
steps: Draw a poster showing tribal life or Birsa Munda
Add short captions explaining the picture
Present the poster in class
